description: Style Note We're sure your wardrobe has at least one little black dress, and now it's time to spruce up your party wear further with LBDs with different styling and creative patterns. This black glittery dress from the Sparkle collection of jealous 21 is a must have evening wear. Pair it with gold accessories and gold high heels and you're ready to send temperatures soaring! Product Details A shiny black dress with gold shimmer throughout, has a V-neckline and a separate draped panel with folds in front, ruched detailing at the sides, a brooch on the left shoulder Material and Care 100% polyester Hand wash or machine wash using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
